query:
SELECT 
  t.id as tournament_id,
  t.name as tournament_name,
  g.phase,
  COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(g.team_a_id, 0)) + COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(g.team_b_id, 0)) as approx_teams,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.team_a_id) as unique_team_a,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.team_b_id) as unique_team_b,
  COUNT(*) as game_count
FROM games g
JOIN tournaments t ON t.id = g.tournament_id
WHERE g.phase IS NOT NULL AND g.phase != '' AND g.phase NOT LIKE 'group_%' AND g.phase != 'group_stage'
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, g.phase
ORDER BY t.id, g.phase
LIMIT 30;
